_comment_api: Your ElevenLabs API key — replace the placeholder below
_comment_speed: Baseline playback speed. Range: 0.5 (half speed) – 2.0 (double speed). 1.0 = normal.
_comment_sapi_rate: When true, the engine also honours the rate slider in SAPI apps that provide one.
_comment_sapi_rate2: Each SAPI rate unit adds/subtracts 5% on top of the 'speed' baseline above.
_comment_sapi_rate3: Set to false to ignore the app's rate control and use only 'speed' above.
